calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Daniel Piccinini, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Philip V. Lyons, individually and dba Harrington's Pub, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants.
Defaults entered against defendants Michael Fuller and Russell Fuller on May 24, 2007.
Defaults entered against defendants Brian Fuller and Doctor Plumber, Inc., a California Corporation on June 11, 2008 and August 24, 2007, respectively.

Exhibit 1---5 Checks from Doctor Plumber, Inc.----------------------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 2---Three page printout from the California Secretary
of State - California Business Search re: Doctor Plumber, Inc.------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 3---One page Advertisement for Doctor Plumber, Inc.---------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 4---Four page document re: Doctor Plumber, Inc.-------------------------------ID/EVID Exhibit 5---Three page document re: Doctor Plumber, Inc.------------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 6---Copy of comoplaint in Danile Milligan vs. Durham Grimes
and Doctor Plumber, Inc. filed endorsed 09/12/08--------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 7---3 page letter w/attachments from John T. Borovac
to Daniel Piccinini, Esq. dated February 15, 2007-------------------------ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Philip V. Lyons, individually and dba Harrington's Pub, and against the Defaulted Defendants Michael Fuller, Brian Fuller, Russell Fuller and Doctor Plumber, Inc., a California corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $102,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $23,300.27.
Costs - $1,524.60, for a total of $125,824.87.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
